name: vendor.myndhyve.ai
description: MyndHyve envelope-protocol AI nodes. Distinct from core.openwop.ai (which ships provider-agnostic chat-completion + structured-output + embeddings) — this pack ships MyndHyve-specific nodes that work with typed envelopes (`prd.create`, `theme.create`, etc.) emitted into the workflow's envelope stream, and prompts resolved from MyndHyve's prompt library by ID.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Generate From Prompt
nodes.description: Calls an LLM with an inline prompt template, emits a typed envelope to the workflow's envelope stream, and returns the envelope payload. The envelopeType is config-declared; the host's envelope normalizer + artifact-sync registries route the result to canonical stores (PRD store, theme store, etc.).

nodes.label: Await Envelope
nodes.description: Suspends the run waiting for a typed envelope of `envelopeType` to arrive on the run's envelope stream (typically emitted by another AI turn). Returns the envelope payload on resume. Pairs with core.ai.generateFromPrompt on the producer side.

nodes.label: Call Prompt
nodes.description: Resolves a system prompt by `promptId` from the host's prompt library, substitutes runtime variables, calls the LLM, and emits the typed envelope. Higher-level wrapper around generateFromPrompt for workflows that reference canonical prompts (e.g., 'prd-author-v3').
